alerts.headline: Lake Wind Advisory issued May 26 at 2:34PM PDT until May 26 at 5:00PM PDT by NWS Reno NV
alerts.description:
* WHAT...Southwest to west winds 15 to 25 mph with gusts up to 40
mph for Washoe Lake.

* WHERE...Greater Reno-Carson City-Minden Area.

* WHEN...Until 5 PM PDT this afternoon.

* IMPACTS...Small boats, kayaks and paddle boards will be prone to
capsizing and should remain off lake waters until conditions
improve.
alerts.instruction:
Check lake conditions before heading out and be prepared for a
sudden increase in winds and wave heights. Consider postponing
boating activities on the lake until a day with less wind.

alerts.headline: Wind Advisory issued May 26 at 9:58AM PDT until May 27 at 5:00AM PDT by NWS Las Vegas NV
alerts.description:
* WHAT...In Nye County, western Clark County, and Death Valley
National Park, southerly-to-southwesterly winds 20 to 30 mph with
gusts up to 55 mph expected. In Esmeralda County, northwesterly
winds 20 to 30 mph with gusts to 50 mph.

* WHERE...In California, Death Valley National Park. In Nevada,
Esmeralda and Central Nye County and Western Clark and Southern
Nye County.

* WHEN...Until 5 AM PDT Wednesday.

* IMPACTS...Gusty winds will blow around unsecured objects. Tree
limbs could be blown do
alerts.instruction:
Winds this strong can make driving difficult, especially for
high-profile vehicles. Use extra caution.
